name: render_tpb auto-detect

le_5_unreadable_tuplets.note: BWV 854 alone has 8 unreadable (7x12-let + 1x24-let); G-11 only fires when median IOI > 0.3s and so cannot help fast piano demos

discard_rationale: Strict per-demo tuplet count by parsing musicxml time-modification elements: total = 11 (criterion <= 5). G-11's median-IOI-based heuristic only triggers on slow pieces (vocadito_1 = 0.336 s → downgrade to render_tpb=8 helps); fast piano demos like Bach BWV 854 (IOI = 0.15 s) never trigger and keep render_tpb=12, which produces 12-let tuplets. The structural fix is a two-pass tuplet count (Phase H), not an IOI heuristic.
